# fabric_connections (Data Source)

List a Fabric Connections.

Use this data source to list [Connections](https://learn.microsoft.com/fabric/real-time-intelligence/eventhouse) for more information.

-> This item supports Service Principal authentication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fabric_connections" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `values` (Attributes List) The list of Connections. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>

### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>

### Nested Schema for `values`

Optional:

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the connection.
- `id` (String) The object ID of the connection.

Read-Only:

- `connection_details` (Attributes) The connection details of the connection. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values--connection_details))
- `connectivity_type` (String) The connectivity type of the connection. Possible values: `Automatic`, `None`, `OnPremisesGateway`, `OnPremisesGatewayPersonal`, `PersonalCloud`, `ShareableCloud`, `VirtualNetworkGateway`
- `credential_details` (Attributes) The credential details of the connection. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values--credential_details))
- `gateway_id` (String) The gateway object ID of the connection.
- `privacy_level` (String) The privacy level of the connection. Possible values: `None`, `Organizational`, `Private`, `Public`

<a id="nestedatt--values--connection_details"></a>

### Nested Schema for `values.connection_details`

Read-Only:

- `path` (String) The path of the connection.
- `type` (String) The type of the connection. <a id="nestedatt--values--credential_details"></a>

### Nested Schema for `values.credential_details`

Read-Only:

- `connection_encryption` (String) The connection encryption type of the connection. Possible values: `Any`, `Encrypted`, `NotEncrypted`
- `credential_type` (String) The credential type of the connection. Possible values: `Anonymous`, `Basic`, `Key`, `OAuth2`, `ServicePrincipal`, `SharedAccessSignature`, `Windows`, `WindowsWithoutImpersonation`, `WorkspaceIdentity`
- `single_sign_on_type` (String) The single sign-on type of the connection. Possible values: `Kerberos`, `KerberosDirectQueryAndRefresh`, `MicrosoftEntraID`, `None`, `SecurityAssertionMarkupLanguage`
- `skip_test_connection` (Boolean) Whether the connection should skip the test connection during creation and update. `True` - Skip the test connection, `False` - Do not skip the test connection.
